About
I am a researcher and educator with expertise in geographic information systems (GIS) and spatial analysis. My work focuses on [your research area — e.g., urban analytics, environmental modeling, spatial data science].
I hold a Ph.D. in [Field] from [University], where my dissertation examined [brief dissertation topic]. I am passionate about making spatial thinking and data literacy accessible through teaching and open-source tools.
